## Checklist

- [ ] `cd worker && npm run check` passes (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] `shellcheck` + `bats tests/` pass (if `skills/pubifact/` was touched)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing change)
- [ ] PR is focused — one logical change
